sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n55399" key="katatartartetame/nws" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καταταρτᾰρ-τεταμένως</orth> (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">κατατείνω</etym>), <sense id="n55399.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">eagerly</tr_>).</sense> </entryFree>
